ideas.expected_edge: Trade volatility release after a dormant period.
ideas.hypothesis: Compression in ATR followed by directional release can signal a tradable expansion event before the move becomes crowded.
ideas.risk_notes: May underperform in persistently trendless range conditions.
ideas.title: ATR Compression Expansion

ideas.expected_edge: Capture confirmed breakouts after volatility expansion.
ideas.hypothesis: A breakout only counts when Donchian expansion is confirmed by ATR expansion and follow-through, reducing false expansion signals.
ideas.risk_notes: Can whipsaw in choppy compression regimes and may lag in fast reversals.
ideas.title: Donchian Breakout Confirmation

ideas.hypothesis: After abnormal expansion, exhaustion often creates a short-term reversion window back toward fair value.
ideas.risk_notes: Can be dangerous in strong trend continuation or news-driven breakouts.
ideas.title: Extreme Expansion Mean Reversion

ideas.expected_edge: Reduce poor-fit trades through regime-aware behavior switching.
ideas.hypothesis: A regime overlay can switch between behavior modes based on volatility regime and suppress poor-fit entries when the market environment is unfavorable.
ideas.risk_notes: Requires reliable regime detection and can over-block if the filter is too strict.
ideas.title: Regime Filter Overlay

ideas.expected_edge: Ride trend continuation after orderly pullbacks.
ideas.hypothesis: A trend filter plus pullback entry can catch continuation moves after brief retracements without chasing extended moves.
ideas.risk_notes: Can fail when pullbacks become full reversals or when trend filters lag too much.
ideas.title: Trend Pullback Continuation
